// About

Ayomide
of Solana.

I’m Ayomide — a multidisciplinary creative at the intersection of design, strategy, and Web3.

My expertise spans graphic design, content writing, social media management and website design — a full 360° creative package.

I’m building my portfolio through self-initiated work and real client projects. Currently open to my next opportunity — if you’re building on Solana or beyond, let’s work.
